    21→set -euo pipefail

    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbgu_*)
    29→
    30→zrbgu_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBGU_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgu already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Validate dependencies
    34→  buv_dir_exists "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"
    35→
    36→  # Ensure dependencies kindled first
    37→  zrbgc_sentinel
    38→  zrbgo_sentinel
    39→
    40→  # Module prefix for temp files
    41→  readonly ZRBGU_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgu_"
    42→  readonly ZRBGU_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}empty.json"
    43→  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGU_EMPTY_JSON}"
    44→
    45→  # Infix values for HTTP operations
    46→  readonly ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON="_u_resp.json"
    47→  readonly ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE="_u_code.txt"
    48→
    49→  # Validate eventual consistency settings from rbgc
    50→  test -n "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC:-}" || buc_die "RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC unset"
    51→  test -n "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC:-}"      || buc_die "RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC unset"
    52→
    53→  readonly ZRBGU_KINDLED=1
    54→}
    55→
    56→zrbgu_sentinel() {
    57→  test "${ZRBGU_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgu not kindled - call zrbgu_kindle first"

    60→######################################################################
    61→# Predicate Functions
    62→
    63→rbgu_json_valid_predicate() {
    64→  zrbgu_sentinel
    65→  local -r z_infix="${1:-}"
    66→  test -n "${z_infix}" || return 1
    67→
    68→  local -r z_json_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
    69→  test -f "${z_json_file}" || return 1
    70→
    71→  jq -e . "${z_json_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1
    72→}
    73→
    74→rbgu_role_member_exists_predicate() {
    75→  zrbgu_sentinel
    76→  local -r z_infix="${1:-}"
    77→  local -r z_role="${2:-}"
    78→  local -r z_member="${3:-}"
    79→
    80→  test -n "${z_infix}" || return 1
    81→  test -n "${z_role}"  || return 1
    82→  test -n "${z_member}" || return 1
    83→
    84→  local -r z_json_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
    85→  test -f "${z_json_file}" || return 1
    86→
    87→  jq -e --arg r "${z_role}" --arg m "${z_member}" \
    88→    'any(.bindings[]? | select(.role==$r) | .members[]?; . == $m)' \
    89→    "${z_json_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1

    92→######################################################################

    94→
    95→rbgu_error_message_capture() {
    96→  zrbgu_sentinel
    97→  local -r z_infix="${1:-}"
    98→  test -n "${z_infix}" || return 1
    99→
   100→  if rbgu_json_valid_predicate "${z_infix}"; then
   101→    rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message' 2>/dev/null || return 1

   107→rbgu_urlencode_capture() {
   108→  zrbgu_sentinel
   109→  local z_s="${1:-}"
   110→  local z_out=""
   111→  local z_i=0
   112→  local z_c
   113→  local z_hex
   114→
   115→  buc_log_args "Percent encoding -> ${z_s}"
   116→
   117→  while test ${z_i} -lt ${#z_s}; do
   118→    z_c="${z_s:z_i:1}"
   119→    case "${z_c}" in
   120→      [A-Za-z0-9._~\-]) z_out="${z_out}${z_c}" ;;
   121→      *) printf -v z_hex '%%%02X' "'${z_c}"; z_out="${z_out}${z_hex}" ;;
   122→    esac
   123→    z_i=$((z_i + 1))
   124→  done
   125→
   126→  buc_log_args "Encoded ${z_out}"
   127→  test -n "${z_out}" || return 1
   128→  echo "${z_out}"
   129→}

   131→# Compose service account email from name and project ID.

   146→# Add member to IAM policy role binding with version=3 enforcement
   147→#
   148→# RBGU IAM Policy Standard: All IAM policies are standardized to version=3
   149→# to ensure consistent conditional role binding support across Google Cloud APIs.
   150→# This is enforced by default in all policy operations to prevent version drift.
   151→#
   152→# Args: infix role member [etag_optional]
   153→# Returns: JSON policy string with added member and version=3
   154→rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture() {
   155→  zrbgu_sentinel
   156→
   157→  local -r z_infix="${1:-}"
   158→  local -r z_role="${2:-}"
   159→  local -r z_member="${3:-}"
   160→  local -r z_etag_opt="${4:-}"
   161→
   162→  local -r z_policy_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   163→
   164→  test -n "${z_policy_file}" || return 1
   165→  test -f "${z_policy_file}" || return 1
   166→  test -n "${z_role}"        || return 1
   167→  test -n "${z_member}"      || return 1
   168→
   169→  local z_out=""
   170→  z_out=$(
   171→    jq --arg role "${z_role}" --arg member "${z_member}" --arg etag "${z_etag_opt}" '
   172→      # Enforce RBGU standard: version=3 for all IAM policies
   173→      .version = 3 |
   174→      .bindings = (.bindings // []) |
   175→      if ([.bindings[]? | .role] | index($role))
   176→      then .bindings |= map(if .role == $role
   177→                            then .members = ((.members // []) + [$member] | unique)
   178→                            else . end)
   179→      else .bindings += [{role: $role, members: [$member]}]
   180→      end
   181→      # Set etag if provided (optimistic concurrency)
   182→      | (if $etag != "" then .etag = $etag else . end)
   183→    ' "${z_policy_file}"
   184→  ) || return 1
   185→
   186→  test -n "${z_out}" || return 1
   187→  printf '%s\n' "${z_out}"
   188→}
   189→
   190→rbgu_json_field_capture() {
   191→  zrbgu_sentinel
   192→  local -r z_infix="${1}"
   193→  local -r z_jq="${2}"
   194→  local -r z_json_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"

   213→

   224→rbgu_authenticate_role_capture() {

   243→
   244→# JSON file writer helper (vanilla empty policy)
   245→rbgu_write_vanilla_json() {
   246→  zrbgu_sentinel
   247→  local -r z_infix="${1:-}"
   248→  test -n "${z_infix}" || return 1
   249→
   250→  local -r z_json_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"

   254→
   255→# Apply jq filter to file, writing result to same or different file
   256→rbgu_jq_file_to_file_ok() {
   257→  zrbgu_sentinel
   258→  local -r z_source_infix="${1:-}"
   259→  local -r z_target_infix="${2:-}"
   260→  local -r z_jq_filter="${3:-}"
   261→
   262→  test -n "${z_source_infix}" || return 1
   263→  test -n "${z_target_infix}" || return 1
   264→  test -n "${z_jq_filter}"    || return 1
   265→
   266→  local -r z_source_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_source_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   267→  local -r z_target_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_target_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   268→
   269→  test -f "${z_source_file}" || return 1
   270→
   271→  jq "${z_jq_filter}" "${z_source_file}" > "${z_target_file}" || return 1
   272→  test -f "${z_target_file}" || return 1
   273→}
   274→
   275→######################################################################
   276→# External Functions (rbgu_*)
   277→
   278→# JSON REST helper (hardcoded headers)
   279→# Args: method url token infix [body_file]
   280→# Pass "-" as body_file to read body from stdin (curl @- convention).
   281→# Use this for request bodies containing secrets to avoid disk persistence.
   282→rbgu_http_json() {
   283→  zrbgu_sentinel
   284→
   285→  local -r z_method="${1}"
   286→  local -r z_url="${2}"
   287→  local -r z_token="${3}"
   288→  local -r z_infix="${4}"
   289→  local -r z_body_file="${5:-}"
   290→
   291→  local z_curl_status=0
   292→  local z_attempt=0
   293→  local -r z_max_attempts=3
   294→  local -r z_retry_sleep=3
   295→
   296→  while :; do
   297→    z_curl_status=0
   298→    z_attempt=$((z_attempt + 1))
   299→
   300→    # Each attempt writes to uniquely-suffixed files; callers use z_infix_u
   301→    z_infix_u="${z_infix}_${z_attempt}"
   302→    local z_resp_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   303→    local z_code_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}"
   304→    local z_code_errs="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}.stderr"
   305→
   306→    if test -n "${z_body_file}"; then
   307→      curl                                              \
   308→          -sS                                           \
   309→          --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
   310→          --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"        \
   311→          -X "${z_method}"                              \
   312→          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   313→          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   314→          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   315→          -d @"${z_body_file}"                          \
   316→          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
   317→          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   318→          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   319→                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   320→        || z_curl_status=$?
   321→    else
   322→      curl                                              \
   323→          -sS                                           \
   324→          --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
   325→          --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"        \
   326→          -X "${z_method}"                              \
   327→          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   328→          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   329→          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   330→          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
   331→          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   332→          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   333→                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   334→        || z_curl_status=$?
   335→    fi
   336→
   337→    buc_log_args 'Curl status' "${z_curl_status}"
   338→    buc_log_pipe < "${z_code_errs}"
   339→
   340→    # Success — break out of retry loop
   341→    test "${z_curl_status}" -ne 0 || break
   342→
   343→    # Retry on transient curl errors: 7=connection refused, 28=timeout,
   344→    # 35=SSL error, 56=recv failure. Die immediately on all others.
   345→    case "${z_curl_status}" in
   346→      7|28|35|56) ;;
   347→      *) buc_die "HTTP request failed (curl exit ${z_curl_status})" ;;
   348→    esac
   349→
   350→    test "${z_attempt}" -lt "${z_max_attempts}" \
   351→      || buc_die "HTTP request failed after ${z_max_attempts} attempts (curl exit ${z_curl_status})"
   352→
   353→    buc_log_args "Transient curl error (exit ${z_curl_status}), retry ${z_attempt}/${z_max_attempts} in ${z_retry_sleep}s"
   354→    sleep "${z_retry_sleep}"
   355→  done
   356→
   357→  # Register successful attempt under bare infix for capture functions
   358→  cp "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}" "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   359→  cp "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}" "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}"
   360→
   361→  local z_code
   362→  z_code=$(<"${z_code_file}") || buc_die "Failed to read code file"
   363→  test -n "${z_code}"         || buc_die "Empty HTTP code from curl"
   364→
   365→  buc_log_args "HTTP ${z_method} ${z_url} returned code ${z_code}"
   366→}
   367→
   368→rbgu_http_json_remit() {
   369→  zrbgu_sentinel
   370→
   371→  local -r z_method="${1}"
   372→  local -r z_url="${2}"
   373→  local -r z_token="${3}"
   374→  local -r z_infix="${4}"
   375→  local -r z_body_file="${5:-}"
   376→
   377→  local z_curl_status=0
   378→  local z_attempt=0
   379→  local -r z_max_attempts=3
   380→  local -r z_retry_sleep=3
   381→
   382→  while :; do
   383→    z_curl_status=0
   384→    z_attempt=$((z_attempt + 1))
   385→
   386→    local z_resp_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   387→    local z_code_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}"
   388→    local z_code_errs="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}.stderr"
   389→
   390→    if test -n "${z_body_file}"; then
   391→      curl                                              \
   392→          -sS                                           \
   393→          --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
   394→          --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"        \
   395→          -X "${z_method}"                              \
   396→          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   397→          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   398→          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   399→          -d @"${z_body_file}"                          \
   400→          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
   401→          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   402→          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   403→                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   404→        || z_curl_status=$?
   405→    else
   406→      curl                                              \
   407→          -sS                                           \
   408→          --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
   409→          --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"        \
   410→          -X "${z_method}"                              \
   411→          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   412→          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   413→          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   414→          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
   415→          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   416→          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   417→                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   418→        || z_curl_status=$?
   419→    fi
   420→
   421→    buc_log_args 'Curl status' "${z_curl_status}"
   422→    buc_log_pipe < "${z_code_errs}"
   423→
   424→    test "${z_curl_status}" -ne 0 || break
   425→
   426→    case "${z_curl_status}" in
   427→      7|28|35|56) ;;
   428→      *)
   429→        buc_log_args "HTTP request failed (curl exit ${z_curl_status})"
   430→        return 1
   431→        ;;
   432→    esac
   433→
   434→    if test "${z_attempt}" -ge "${z_max_attempts}"; then
   435→      buc_log_args "HTTP request failed after ${z_max_attempts} attempts (curl exit ${z_curl_status})"
   436→      return 1
   437→    fi

   439→    buc_log_args "Transient curl error (exit ${z_curl_status}), retry ${z_attempt}/${z_max_attempts} in ${z_retry_sleep}s"
   440→    sleep "${z_retry_sleep}"
   441→  done
   442→
   443→  local z_code
   444→  z_code=$(<"${z_code_file}") || { buc_log_args "Failed to read code file"; return 1; }
   445→  test -n "${z_code}"         || { buc_log_args "Empty HTTP code from curl"; return 1; }
   446→
   447→  buc_log_args "HTTP ${z_method} ${z_url} returned code ${z_code}"
   448→  printf '%s' "${BUC_REMIT_VALID}${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}${z_code}${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}${z_resp_file}"
   449→}
   450→
   451→rbgu_http_ok_remit() {
   452→  zrbgu_sentinel
   453→
   454→  local -r z_label="${1}"
   455→  local -r z_token="${2}"
   456→  local -r z_method="${3}"
   457→  local -r z_url="${4}"
   458→  local -r z_infix="${5}"
   459→  local -r z_body_file="${6}"
   460→  local -r z_warn_code="${7:-}"
   461→  local -r z_warn_msg="${8:-}"
   462→
   463→  buc_log_args "${z_label}"
   464→
   465→  local z_remit_valid z_code z_resp
   466→  IFS="${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}" read -r z_remit_valid z_code z_resp \
   467→    <<< "$(rbgu_http_json_remit "${z_method}" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" "${z_body_file:-}")"
   468→
   469→  test "${z_remit_valid}" = "${BUC_REMIT_VALID}" || return 1
   470→
   471→  case "${z_code}" in
   472→    200|201|204)
   473→      printf '%s' "${BUC_REMIT_VALID}${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}${z_code}${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}${z_resp}"
   474→      return 0
   475→      ;;
   476→  esac
   477→
   478→  if test -n "${z_warn_code}" && test "${z_code}" = "${z_warn_code}"; then
   479→    printf '%s' "${BUC_REMIT_VALID}${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}${z_code}${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}${z_resp}"
   480→    return 0
   481→  fi
   482→
   483→  local z_err=""
   484→  if jq -e . "${z_resp}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   485→    z_err=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message') || z_err="Unknown error"
   486→  else
   487→    local z_content
   488→    z_content=$(<"${z_resp}") || z_content=""
   489→    z_err="${z_content:0:200}"
   490→    z_err="${z_err//$'\n'/ }"
   491→    z_err="${z_err//$'\r'/ }"
   492→    test -n "${z_err}" || z_err="Non-JSON error body"
   493→  fi
   494→
   495→  buc_log_args "${z_label} (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
   496→  return 1
   497→}

   499→rbgu_http_require_ok() {
   500→  zrbgu_sentinel
   501→  local -r z_ctx="$1"
   502→  local -r z_infix="$2"
   503→  local -r z_warn_code="${3:-}"
   504→  local -r z_warn_message="${4:-already exists}"
   505→
   506→  local z_code
   507→  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") \
   508→    || buc_die "${z_ctx}: failed to read HTTP code"
   509→
   510→  case "${z_code}" in
   511→    200|201|204) return 0 ;;
   512→  esac
   513→
   514→  if test -n "${z_warn_code}" && test "${z_code}" = "${z_warn_code}"; then
   515→    buc_warn "${z_ctx}: ${z_warn_message}"
   516→    return 0
   517→  fi
   518→
   519→  local z_err=""
   520→  local -r z_response_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   521→
   522→  if jq -e . "${z_response_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   523→    z_err=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message') || z_err="Unknown error"
   524→  else
   525→    local z_content=$(<"${z_response_file}")
   526→    test -n "${z_content}" || z_content=""
   527→    z_err="${z_content:0:200}"
   528→    z_err="${z_err//$'\n'/ }"
   529→    z_err="${z_err//$'\r'/ }"
   530→    test -n "${z_err}" || z_err="Non-JSON error body"
   531→  fi
   532→
   533→  buc_die "${z_ctx} (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
   534→}

   536→rbgu_http_json_ok() {
   537→  zrbgu_sentinel
   538→
   539→  local -r z_label="$1"
   540→  local -r z_token="$2"
   541→  local -r z_method="$3"
   542→  local -r z_url="$4"
   543→  local -r z_infix="$5"
   544→  local -r z_body_file="$6"
   545→  local -r z_warn_code="${7:-}"
   546→  local -r z_warn_message="${8:-}"
   547→
   548→  buc_log_args "${z_label}"
   549→
   550→  # Perform HTTP request (body file may be "")
   551→  rbgu_http_json "${z_method}" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" "${z_body_file:-}"
   552→
   553→  # Enforce success (warn/ignore if optional params provided)
   554→  rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label}" "${z_infix}" "${z_warn_code:-}" "${z_warn_message:-}"
   555→}
   556→
   557→# POST + strict LRO handling (no heuristics)
   558→rbgu_http_json_lro_ok() {
   559→  zrbgu_sentinel
   560→
   561→  local -r z_label="${1}"
   562→  local -r z_token="${2}"
   563→  local -r z_post_url="${3}"
   564→  local -r z_infix="${4}"
   565→  local -r z_body="${5}"
   566→  local -r z_name_jq="${6}"
   567→  local -r z_poll_root="${7}"
   568→  local -r z_op_prefix="${8}"
   569→  local -r z_poll_interval="${9:-${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}}"
   570→  local -r z_timeout="${10:-${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}}"
   571→
   572→  buc_log_args '1) POST the request'
   573→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_post_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" "${z_body}"
   574→  rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label}" "${z_infix}"
   575→
   576→  local z_done=""
   577→  z_done=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
   578→  test "${z_done}" = "true" && {
   579→    local z_lro_error=""
   580→    z_lro_error=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message // empty') || z_lro_error=""
   581→    if test -n "${z_lro_error}"; then
   582→      local z_lro_resp_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   583→      buc_warn "${z_label}: LRO completed with error — response saved: ${z_lro_resp_file}"
   584→      buc_die "${z_label}: ${z_lro_error}"
   585→    fi
   586→    buc_log_args 'Immediate-done response -> success (no polling)'
   587→    return 0
   588→  }
   589→
   590→  buc_log_args '2) Extract op name (or return if not an LRO)'
   591→  local z_name
   592→  z_name=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" "${z_name_jq}") || z_name=""
   593→  test -n "${z_name}" || {
   594→    buc_log_args 'No LRO name present - treat as non-LRO success'
   595→    return 0
   596→  }
   597→  buc_log_args '3) Build poll URL based on operation name format'
   598→  local z_poll_url
   599→  if [[ "${z_name}" =~ ^projects/.*/locations/.*/operations/ ]]; then
   600→    buc_log_args '  Regional operation with fully-qualified name'
   601→    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
   602→  elif [[ "${z_name}" =~ ^projects/.*/operations/ ]]; then
   603→    buc_log_args '  Global operation with project prefix'
   604→    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
   605→  elif test -n "${z_op_prefix}" && [[ ! "${z_name}" =~ ^${z_op_prefix} ]]; then
   606→    buc_log_args '  Legacy format - apply prefix (not already present)'
   607→    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_op_prefix}${z_name}"
   608→  else
   609→    buc_log_args '  Use name as-is under versioned root'
   610→    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
   611→  fi
   612→  buc_log_args "Poll URL: ${z_poll_url}"
   613→
   614→  buc_log_args '4) Poll until done or timeout'
   615→  local z_elapsed=0
   616→  while :; do
   617→    sleep "${z_poll_interval}"
   618→    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + z_poll_interval))
   619→
   620→    local z_poll_infix="${z_infix}-poll-${z_elapsed}s"
   621→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_poll_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_poll_infix}"
   622→
   623→    local z_code=""
   624→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_poll_infix}") || z_code=""
   625→    test "${z_code}" = "200" || buc_die "${z_label}: poll failed (HTTP ${z_code})"
   626→
   627→    z_done=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_poll_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
   628→    test "${z_done}" = "true" && {
   629→      local z_lro_error=""
   630→      z_lro_error=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_poll_infix}" '.error.message // empty') || z_lro_error=""
   631→      if test -n "${z_lro_error}"; then
   632→        local z_lro_resp_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_poll_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   633→        buc_warn "${z_label}: LRO completed with error — response saved: ${z_lro_resp_file}"
   634→        buc_die "${z_label}: ${z_lro_error}"
   635→      fi
   636→      buc_log_args "${z_label}: operation completed after ${z_elapsed}s"
   637→      return 0
   638→    }
   639→
   640→    test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${z_timeout}" && buc_die "${z_label}: timeout after ${z_timeout}s"
   641→    buc_log_args "Still running at ${z_elapsed}s..."
   642→  done
   643→}
   644→
   645→# Poll endpoint until HTTP 200 (for IAM/resource propagation waits)
   646→rbgu_poll_until_ok() {
   647→  zrbgu_sentinel
   648→
   649→  local -r z_method="${1}"
   650→  local -r z_label="${2}"
   651→  local -r z_url="${3}"
   652→  local -r z_token="${4}"
   653→  local -r z_infix="${5}"
   654→
   655→  local z_elapsed=0
   656→  while :; do
   657→    local z_poll_infix="${z_infix}-${z_elapsed}s"
   658→    rbgu_http_json "${z_method}" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_poll_infix}" || true
   659→
   660→    local z_code
   661→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_poll_infix}") || z_code=""
   662→
   663→    if test "${z_code}" = "200"; then
   664→      buc_log_args "${z_label} ready after ${z_elapsed} seconds"
   665→      return 0
   666→    fi
   667→
   668→    test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" && buc_die "${z_label}: timeout after ${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}s"
   669→    buc_log_args "${z_label} not ready (HTTP ${z_code}), waiting ${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}s..."
   670→    sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
   671→    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
   672→  done
   673→}

   675→# Predicate: Check if resource was newly created and apply propagation delay
   676→rbgu_newly_created_delay() {
   677→  zrbgu_sentinel
   678→
   679→  local -r z_infix="${1}"
   680→  local -r z_resource="${2}"
   681→  local -r z_delay="${3}"

   683→  local z_code

   692→rbgu_extract_json_to_rbra() {
   693→  zrbgu_sentinel
   694→
   695→  local -r z_json_path="$1"
   696→  local -r z_rbra_path="$2"
   697→  local -r z_lifetime_sec="$3"
   698→  local -r z_expected_project_id="${4:-}"
   699→
   700→  test -f "${z_json_path}" || buc_die "Service account JSON not found: ${z_json_path}"
   701→
   702→  buc_info "Extracting service account credentials from JSON"
   703→
   704→  buc_log_args 'Extract fields'
   705→  local z_client_email
   706→  z_client_email=$(jq -r '.client_email' "${z_json_path}") \
   707→                                        || buc_die "Failed to extract client_email"
   708→  test -n "${z_client_email}"           || buc_die "Empty client_email in JSON"
   709→  test    "${z_client_email}" != "null" || buc_die "Null client_email in JSON"
   710→
   711→  local z_private_key
   712→  z_private_key=$(jq -r '.private_key' "${z_json_path}") \
   713→                                       || buc_die "Failed to extract private_key"
   714→  test -n "${z_private_key}"           || buc_die "Empty private_key in JSON"
   715→  test    "${z_private_key}" != "null" || buc_die "Null private_key in JSON"
   716→
   717→  local z_project_id
   718→  z_project_id=$(jq -r '.project_id' "${z_json_path}") \
   719→                                      || buc_die "Failed to extract project_id"
   720→  test -n "${z_project_id}"           || buc_die "Empty project_id in JSON"
   721→  test    "${z_project_id}" != "null" || buc_die "Null project_id in JSON"
   722→
   723→  if [ -n "${z_expected_project_id}" ]; then
   724→    buc_log_args "Verify project matches expected: ${z_expected_project_id}"
   725→    test "${z_project_id}" = "${z_expected_project_id}" \
   726→      || buc_die "Project mismatch: JSON has '${z_project_id}', expected '${z_expected_project_id}'"
   727→  else
   728→    buc_log_args "No project validation - accepting JSON project_id: ${z_project_id}"
   729→  fi
   730→
   731→  buc_log_args 'Write RBRA file'
   732→  {
   733→    printf 'RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL="%s"\n'      "$z_client_email"
   734→    printf 'RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY="'; printf '%s' "$z_private_key"; printf '"\n'
   735→    printf 'RBRA_PROJECT_ID="%s"\n'        "$z_project_id"
   736→    printf 'RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC=%s\n'  "$z_lifetime_sec"
   737→  } > "${z_rbra_path}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_path}"
   738→
   739→  test -f "${z_rbra_path}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file: ${z_rbra_path}"
   740→
   741→  buc_warn "Consider deleting source JSON after verification: ${z_json_path}"
   742→}

   747→# RBTOE: API Enable Pattern
   748→# Ensures a specified Google Cloud API is enabled in a project with idempotent behavior
   749→rbgu_api_enable() {
   750→  zrbgu_sentinel
   751→
   752→  local -r z_api_service="${1}"
   753→  local -r z_project_id="${2}"
   754→  local -r z_token="${3}"
   755→
   756→  test -n "${z_api_service}" || buc_die "rbgu_api_enable: API service name required"
   757→  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "rbgu_api_enable: project ID required"
   758→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "rbgu_api_enable: access token required"
   759→
   760→  buc_log_args "Enabling API ${z_api_service} in project ${z_project_id}"
   761→
   762→  local -r z_infix="api-enable-${z_api_service}"
   763→  local -r z_enable_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com:enable"
   764→  
   765→  # Attempt to enable the API
   766→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_enable_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" ""
   767→  
   768→  local z_code
   769→  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || buc_die "rbgu_api_enable: failed to read HTTP code"
   770→  
   771→  case "${z_code}" in
   772→    200|201|204) 
   773→      buc_log_args "API enable request successful (HTTP ${z_code})"
   774→      ;;
   775→    400)
   776→      # Check if already enabled
   777→      local z_err
   778→      z_err=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err="Unknown error"
   779→      if [[ "${z_err}" =~ already.enabled ]] || [[ "${z_err}" =~ "already enabled" ]]; then
   780→        buc_log_args "API ${z_api_service} already enabled"
   781→        return 0
   782→      else
   783→        buc_die "rbgu_api_enable (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
   784→      fi
   785→      ;;
   786→    *)
   787→      local z_err
   788→      z_err=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err="Unknown error"
   789→      buc_die "rbgu_api_enable (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
   790→      ;;
   791→  esac
   792→  
   793→  # Check if this returned an LRO that needs polling
   794→  local z_operation_name
   795→  z_operation_name=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".name") || z_operation_name=""
   796→
   797→  if [ -n "${z_operation_name}" ]; then
   798→    buc_log_args "API enable returned LRO, polling for completion"
   799→    # Use the LRO polling mechanism
   800→    local -r z_poll_root="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1"
   801→    rbgu_http_json_lro_ok \
   802→      "API Enable ${z_api_service}" \
   803→      "${z_token}" \
   804→      "${z_enable_url}" \
   805→      "${z_infix}" \
   806→      "" \
   807→      ".name" \
   808→      "${z_poll_root}" \
   809→      ""
   810→  fi
   811→
   812→  # Verify API is enabled
   813→  local -r z_verify_infix="api-verify-${z_api_service}"
   814→  local -r z_verify_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com"
   815→  
   816→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_verify_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_verify_infix}" ""
   817→  rbgu_http_require_ok "API Enable Verify ${z_api_service}" "${z_verify_infix}"
   818→
   819→  local z_state
   820→  z_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_verify_infix}" ".state") || buc_die "Failed to read API state"
   821→
   822→  if [ "${z_state}" != "ENABLED" ]; then
   823→    buc_die "API ${z_api_service} not enabled after request (state: ${z_state})"
   824→  fi
   825→
   826→  buc_log_args "API ${z_api_service} confirmed enabled"
   827→}
   828→
   829→# Provision service agent (Google-managed service account) for an enabled API.
   830→# Uses serviceusage.googleapis.com generateServiceIdentity to deterministically
   831→# ensure the service agent exists before granting it IAM roles.
   832→# Prints the service agent email to stdout.
   833→rbgu_provision_service_agent() {
   834→  zrbgu_sentinel
   835→
   836→  local -r z_api_service="${1}"
   837→  local -r z_project_id="${2}"
   838→  local -r z_token="${3}"
   839→
   840→  test -n "${z_api_service}" || buc_die "rbgu_provision_service_agent: API service name required"
   841→  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "rbgu_provision_service_agent: project ID required"
   842→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "rbgu_provision_service_agent: access token required"
   843→
   844→  buc_log_args "Provisioning service agent for ${z_api_service} in ${z_project_id}"
   845→
   846→  local -r z_infix="provision-sa-${z_api_service}"
   847→  local -r z_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1beta1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com:generateServiceIdentity"
   848→
   849→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" ""
   850→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Provision service agent ${z_api_service}" "${z_infix}"
   851→
   852→  local z_done
   853→  z_done=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
   854→
   855→  local z_final_infix="${z_infix}"
   856→  if test "${z_done}" != "true"; then
   857→    local z_op_name
   858→    z_op_name=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".name") || buc_die "Provision ${z_api_service}: no operation name"
   859→    local -r z_poll_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1beta1/${z_op_name}"
   860→
   861→    local z_elapsed=0
   862→    while :; do
   863→      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
   864→      z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
   865→
   866→      z_final_infix="${z_infix}-poll-${z_elapsed}s"
   867→      rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_poll_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_final_infix}"
   868→
   869→      local z_code
   870→      z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_final_infix}") || z_code=""
   871→      test "${z_code}" = "200" || buc_die "Provision ${z_api_service}: poll failed (HTTP ${z_code})"
   872→
   873→      z_done=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_final_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
   874→      test "${z_done}" = "true" && break
   875→
   876→      test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" \
   877→        && buc_die "Provision ${z_api_service}: timeout after ${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}s"
   878→      buc_log_args "Provision ${z_api_service}: still running at ${z_elapsed}s..."
   879→    done
   880→  fi
   881→
   882→  local z_email
   883→  z_email=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_final_infix}" ".response.email") || z_email=""
   884→  test -n "${z_email}" || buc_die "Provision service agent ${z_api_service}: no email in response"
   885→
   886→  buc_log_args "Service agent provisioned: ${z_email}"
   887→  printf '%s' "${z_email}"
   888→}

   890→# RBTOE: RBRA Load Pattern
   891→# Sources an RBRA file and validates required fields
   892→rbgu_rbra_load() {
   893→  zrbgu_sentinel
   894→
   895→  local -r z_rbra_file="${1}"
   896→
   897→  test -n "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA file path required"
   898→  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA file not found: ${z_rbra_file}"
   899→
   900→  buc_log_args "Loading and validating RBRA credentials from ${z_rbra_file}"
   901→
   902→  # Source the RBRA file
   903→  # shellcheck source=/dev/null
   904→  source "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: failed to source RBRA file"
   905→
   906→  # Validate required fields
   907→  test -n "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL:-}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL missing from ${z_rbra_file}"
   908→  test -n "${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY:-}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY missing from ${z_rbra_file}"
   909→  test -n "${RBRA_PROJECT_ID:-}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_PROJECT_ID missing from ${z_rbra_file}"
   910→
   911→  # Check for null values
   912→  test "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL}" != "null" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL is null in ${z_rbra_file}"
   913→  test "${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY}" != "null" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY is null in ${z_rbra_file}"
   914→  test "${RBRA_PROJECT_ID}" != "null" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_PROJECT_ID is null in ${z_rbra_file}"
   915→
   916→  buc_log_args "RBRA validation successful: ${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL} in project ${RBRA_PROJECT_ID}"
   917→}

   919→# RBTOE: RBRO Load Pattern
   920→# Loads and validates RBRO credentials
   921→rbgu_rbro_load() {
   922→  zrbgu_sentinel
   923→

    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBI_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbi multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBI_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbi_*)
    29→
    30→zrbi_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBI_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbi already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Verify RBGO is available
    34→  test "${ZRBGO_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgo not kindled - must kindle rbgo before rbi"
    35→
    36→  # Check required environment
    37→  test -n "${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY:-}" || buc_die "RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY not set"
    38→  zburd_sentinel
    39→
    40→  # Verify GAR service account file is configured
    41→  test -n "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE:-}"   || buc_die "RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE not set"
    42→  test -f "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"     || buc_die "GAR service env file not found: ${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
    43→
    44→  # Module Variables (ZRBI_*)
    45→  readonly ZRBI_REGISTRY_HOST="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
    46→  readonly ZRBI_REGISTRY_PATH="${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
    47→  readonly ZRBI_REGISTRY_API_BASE="https://${ZRBI_REGISTRY_HOST}/v2/${ZRBI_REGISTRY_PATH}"
    48→  readonly ZRBI_GAR_API_BASE="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com/v1"
    49→  readonly ZRBI_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}/repositories/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
    50→
    51→  # Media types
    52→  readonly ZRBI_MTYPE_DLIST="application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.list.v2+json"
    53→  readonly ZRBI_MTYPE_OCI="application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json"
    54→  readonly ZRBI_MTYPE_DV2="application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json"
    55→  readonly ZRBI_MTYPE_OCM="application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json"
    56→  readonly ZRBI_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES="${ZRBI_MTYPE_DV2},${ZRBI_MTYPE_DLIST},${ZRBI_MTYPE_OCI},${ZRBI_MTYPE_OCM}"
    57→
    58→  # File prefixes for all operations
    59→  readonly ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_manifest_"
    60→  readonly ZRBI_CONFIG_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_config_"
    61→  readonly ZRBI_DETAIL_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_detail_"
    62→  readonly ZRBI_TOKEN_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_token_"
    63→  readonly ZRBI_TAGS_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_tags_"
    64→  readonly ZRBI_METADATA_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_metadata_"
    65→
    66→  # Output files
    67→  readonly ZRBI_IMAGE_RECORDS_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_IMAGE_RECORDS.json"
    68→  readonly ZRBI_IMAGE_DETAIL_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_IMAGE_DETAILS.json"
    69→  readonly ZRBI_IMAGE_STATS_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_IMAGE_STATS.json"
    70→  readonly ZRBI_FQIN_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_FQIN.txt"
    71→  readonly ZRBI_TOKEN_FILE="${ZRBI_TOKEN_PREFIX}access.txt"
    72→  readonly ZRBI_METADATA_ARCHIVE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbi_metadata.tgz"
    73→
    74→  # File index counter
    75→  z_rbi_file_index=0
    76→
    77→  # Initialize detail file
    78→  echo "[]" > "${ZRBI_IMAGE_DETAIL_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize detail file"
    79→
    80→  # Obtain initial OAuth token
    81→  zrbi_refresh_token || buc_die "Cannot proceed without OAuth token"
    82→
    83→  readonly ZRBI_KINDLED=1
    84→}
    85→
    86→zrbi_sentinel() {
    87→  test "${ZRBI_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbi not kindled - call zrbi_kindle first"
    88→}
    89→
    90→zrbi_refresh_token() {
    91→  # No sentinel check - called from kindle before KINDLED=1
    92→  buc_log_args "Obtaining OAuth token for GAR API"
    93→  local z_token=""
    94→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token from RBGO"
    95→  echo "${z_token}" > "${ZRBI_TOKEN_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to write token file"
    96→}
    97→
    98→zrbi_get_next_index_capture() {
    99→  zrbi_sentinel
   100→
   101→  z_rbi_file_index=$((z_rbi_file_index + 1))
   102→  printf "%03d" "${z_rbi_file_index}"
   103→}
   104→
   105→zrbi_curl_registry() {
   106→  zrbi_sentinel
   107→
   108→  local z_url="$1"
   109→  local z_token
   110→  z_token=$(<"${ZRBI_TOKEN_FILE}")
   111→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Token is empty"
   112→
   113→  curl -sL                                          \
   114→      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
   115→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   116→      -H "Accept: ${ZRBI_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"   \
   117→      "${z_url}"                                    \
   118→    || buc_die "Registry API call failed: ${z_url}"
   119→}
   120→
   121→zrbi_process_single_manifest() {
   122→  zrbi_sentinel
   123→
   124→  local z_tag="$1"
   125→  local z_manifest_file="$2"
   126→  local z_platform="${3:-}"  # Empty for single-platform
   127→
   128→  # Get config digest
   129→  local z_config_digest_file="${ZRBI_CONFIG_PREFIX}digest.txt"
   130→  jq -r '.config.digest' "${z_manifest_file}" > "${z_config_digest_file}" || buc_die "Failed to extract config digest"
   131→
   132→  local z_config_digest
   133→  z_config_digest=$(<"${z_config_digest_file}")
   134→  test -n "${z_config_digest}" || buc_die "Config digest is empty"
   135→  test "${z_config_digest}" != "null" || {
   136→    buc_warn "null config.digest in manifest"
   137→    return 0
   138→  }
   139→
   140→  # Fetch config blob
   141→  local z_idx
   142→  z_idx=$(zrbi_get_next_index_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get next index"
   143→  local z_config_out="${ZRBI_CONFIG_PREFIX}${z_idx}.json"
   144→
   145→  zrbi_curl_registry "${ZRBI_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/blobs/${z_config_digest}" > "${z_config_out}" \
   146→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch config blob"
   147→
   148→  # Validating config JSON
   149→  jq . "${z_config_out}" > /dev/null || buc_die "Invalid config JSON"
   150→
   151→  # Build detail entry
   152→  local z_detail_idx
   153→  z_detail_idx=$(zrbi_get_next_index_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get detail index"
   154→  local z_temp_detail="${ZRBI_DETAIL_PREFIX}${z_detail_idx}.json"
   155→
   156→  local z_manifest_json=$(<"${z_manifest_file}")
   157→  test -n "${z_manifest_json}" || buc_die "Manifest JSON is empty"
   158→
   159→  # Normalize config with defaults
   160→  local z_config_normalized="${ZRBI_CONFIG_PREFIX}normalized_${z_idx}.json"
   161→  jq '. + {
   162→        created: (.created // "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z"),
   163→        architecture: (.architecture // "unknown"),
   164→        os: (.os // "unknown")
   165→      }' "${z_config_out}" > "${z_config_normalized}" \
   166→    || buc_die "Failed to normalize config"
   167→
   168→  local z_config_json=$(<"${z_config_normalized}")
   169→  test -n "${z_config_json}" || buc_die "Normalized config is empty"
   170→
   171→  if test -n "${z_platform}"; then
   172→    jq -n \
   173→      --arg tag          "${z_tag}"           \
   174→      --arg platform     "${z_platform}"      \
   175→      --arg digest       "${z_config_digest}" \
   176→      --argjson manifest "${z_manifest_json}" \
   177→      --argjson config   "${z_config_json}" '
   178→      {
   179→        tag: $tag,
   180→        platform: $platform,
   181→        digest: $digest,
   182→        layers: $manifest.layers,
   183→        config: {
   184→          created: $config.created,
   185→          architecture: $config.architecture,
   186→          os: $config.os
   187→        }
   188→      }' > "${z_temp_detail}" || buc_die "Failed to build platform detail"
   189→  else
   190→    jq -n \
   191→      --arg     tag      "${z_tag}"           \
   192→      --arg     digest   "${z_config_digest}" \
   193→      --argjson manifest "${z_manifest_json}" \
   194→      --argjson config   "${z_config_json}" '
   195→      {
   196→        tag: $tag,
   197→        digest: $digest,
   198→        layers: $manifest.layers,
   199→        config: {
   200→          created: $config.created,
   201→          architecture: $config.architecture,
   202→          os: $config.os
   203→        }
   204→      }' > "${z_temp_detail}" || buc_die "Failed to build single detail"
   205→  fi
   206→
   207→  # Append to detail file
   208→  buc_log_args "Merging image detail"
   209→  local    z_detail_tmp="${ZRBI_IMAGE_DETAIL_FILE}.tmp"
   210→  jq -s '.[0] + [.[1]]' "${ZRBI_IMAGE_DETAIL_FILE}" "${z_temp_detail}" \
   211→    > "${z_detail_tmp}" || buc_die "Failed to merge image detail"
   212→  mv  "${z_detail_tmp}" "${ZRBI_IMAGE_DETAIL_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to move detail file"
   213→}

   215→######################################################################
   216→# External Functions (rbi_*)
   217→
   218→rbi_list() {
   219→  zrbi_sentinel
   220→
   221→  # Documentation block
   222→  buc_doc_brief "List all available image tags from registry"
   223→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   224→
   225→  buc_step "Fetching image tags from GAR"
   226→
   227→  # GAR uses Docker Registry v2 API - list tags endpoint
   228→  local z_tags_response="${ZRBI_TAGS_PREFIX}response.json"
   229→
   230→  zrbi_curl_registry "${ZRBI_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/tags/list" > "${z_tags_response}" \
   231→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch tags list"
   232→
   233→  # Transform to records format
   234→  jq -r --arg prefix "${ZRBI_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBI_REGISTRY_PATH}" \
   235→      '[.tags[] | {tag: ., fqin: ($prefix + "/" + .)}]'              \
   236→      "${z_tags_response}" > "${ZRBI_IMAGE_RECORDS_FILE}"           \
   237→    || buc_die "Failed to transform tags"
   238→
   239→  local z_total_file="${ZRBI_TAGS_PREFIX}total.txt"
   240→  jq '. | length' "${ZRBI_IMAGE_RECORDS_FILE}" > "${z_total_file}" || buc_die "Failed to count tags"
   241→
   242→  local z_total
   243→  z_total=$(<"${z_total_file}")
   244→  test -n "${z_total}" || buc_die "Total count is empty"
   245→
   246→  buc_info "Retrieved ${z_total} total image records"
   247→
   248→  # Display tags to stdout
   249→  echo "Repository: ${ZRBI_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBI_REGISTRY_PATH}"
   250→  echo "Images:"
   251→  jq -r '.[] | .tag' "${ZRBI_IMAGE_RECORDS_FILE}" | sort -r | head -20
   252→
   253→  test "${z_total}" -gt 20 && echo "... (showing 20 of ${z_total} tags)"
   254→
   255→  buc_success "List complete - ${z_total} images"
   256→}
   257→
   258→rbi_show() {
   259→  zrbi_sentinel
   260→
   261→  local z_tag="${1:-}"
   262→
   263→  # Documentation block
   264→  buc_doc_brief "Fetch and display manifest/config for an image tag"
   265→  buc_doc_param "tag" "Image tag to fetch manifest for"
   266→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   267→
   268→  # Validate parameters
   269→  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag parameter required"
   270→
   271→  buc_step "Fetching manifest for: ${z_tag}"
   272→
   273→  local z_idx
   274→  z_idx=$(zrbi_get_next_index_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get index"
   275→  local z_manifest_out="${ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX}${z_idx}.json"
   276→
   277→  zrbi_curl_registry "${ZRBI_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/manifests/${z_tag}" > "${z_manifest_out}" \
   278→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch manifest for ${z_tag}"
   279→
   280→  jq . "${z_manifest_out}" >/dev/null || buc_die "Invalid manifest JSON"
   281→
   282→  local z_media_type_file="${ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX}mediatype_${z_idx}.txt"
   283→  jq -r '.mediaType // .schemaVersion' "${z_manifest_out}" > "${z_media_type_file}" \
   284→    || buc_die "Failed to extract media type"
   285→
   286→  local z_media_type=$(<"${z_media_type_file}")
   287→  test -n "${z_media_type}" || buc_die "Failed to read or empty: ${z_media_type_file}"
   288→
   289→  if test "${z_media_type}" = "${ZRBI_MTYPE_DLIST}" || \
   290→     test "${z_media_type}" = "${ZRBI_MTYPE_OCI}"; then
   291→
   292→    buc_info "Multi-platform image detected"
   293→
   294→    local z_manifests_file="${ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX}list_${z_idx}.jsonl"
   295→    jq -c '.manifests[]' "${z_manifest_out}" > "${z_manifests_file}" \
   296→      || buc_die "Failed to extract manifests"
   297→
   298→    local z_platform_idx=0
   299→    while IFS= read -r z_platform_manifest; do
   300→      local z_platform_digest_file="${ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX}digest_${z_platform_idx}.txt"
   301→      jq -r '.digest' <<<"${z_platform_manifest}" > "${z_platform_digest_file}" \
   302→        || buc_die "Failed to extract platform digest"
   303→
   304→      local z_platform_digest=$(<"${z_platform_digest_file}")
   305→      test -n "${z_platform_digest}" || buc_die "Failed to read or empty: ${z_platform_digest_file}"
   306→
   307→      local z_platform_info_file="${ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX}info_${z_platform_idx}.txt"
   308→      jq -r '"\(.platform.os)/\(.platform.architecture)"' <<<"${z_platform_manifest}" > "${z_platform_info_file}" \
   309→        || buc_die "Failed to extract platform info"
   310→
   311→      local z_platform_info=$(<"${z_platform_info_file}")
   312→      test -n "${z_platform_info}" || buc_die "Failed to read or empty: ${z_platform_info_file}"
   313→
   314→      buc_info "Processing platform: ${z_platform_info}"
   315→
   316→      local z_platform_idx_str
   317→      z_platform_idx_str=$(zrbi_get_next_index_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get platform index"
   318→      local z_platform_out="${ZRBI_MANIFEST_PREFIX}${z_platform_idx_str}.json"
   319→
   320→      zrbi_curl_registry "${ZRBI_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/manifests/${z_platform_digest}" \
   321→        > "${z_platform_out}" || buc_die "Failed to fetch platform manifest"
   322→
   323→      jq . "${z_platform_out}" > /dev/null || buc_die "Invalid platform manifest JSON"
   324→
   325→      zrbi_process_single_manifest "${z_tag}" "${z_platform_out}" "${z_platform_info}"
   326→
   327→      z_platform_idx=$((z_platform_idx + 1))
   328→    done < "${z_manifests_file}"
   329→
   330→  else
   331→    buc_info "Single platform image"
   332→    zrbi_process_single_manifest "${z_tag}" "${z_manifest_out}" ""
   333→  fi
   334→
   335→  # Display summary
   336→  echo "Image: ${z_tag}"
   337→  echo "Details saved to: ${ZRBI_IMAGE_DETAIL_FILE}"
   338→  jq '.' "${ZRBI_IMAGE_DETAIL_FILE}" || buc_warn "Failed to display details"
   339→
   340→  buc_success "Manifest and config retrieved"
   341→}

   343→rbi_metadata() {
   344→  zrbi_sentinel
   345→
   346→  local z_tag="${1:-}"
   347→
   348→  buc_doc_brief "Download GAR build metadata archive for a tag"
   349→  buc_doc_param "tag" "Image tag to fetch metadata for"
   350→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   351→
   352→  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag parameter required"
   353→
   354→  # Refresh token to avoid expiry
   355→  zrbi_refresh_token
   356→
   357→  local z_token
   358→  z_token=$(<"${ZRBI_TOKEN_FILE}") || buc_die "Token read failed"
   359→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Empty token"
   360→
   361→  local z_package_path="${ZRBI_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBI_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages/${z_tag}"
   362→
   363→  buc_step "Downloading GAR metadata for: ${z_tag}"
   364→  curl -s                                             \
   365→       --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
   366→       -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"          \
   367→       "${z_package_path}/versions/metadata:download" \
   368→       -o "${ZRBI_METADATA_ARCHIVE}"                  \
   369→    || buc_die "Failed to download metadata"
   370→
   371→  test -f "${ZRBI_METADATA_ARCHIVE}" || buc_die "Metadata archive not created"
   372→  test -s "${ZRBI_METADATA_ARCHIVE}" || buc_die "Metadata archive is empty"
   373→
   374→  local z_extract_dir="${ZRBI_METADATA_PREFIX}${z_tag}"
   375→  rm -rf "${z_extract_dir}" || buc_warn "Failed to clean previous extract dir"
   376→  mkdir -p "${z_extract_dir}" || buc_die "Failed to create extract directory"
   377→  tar -xzf "${ZRBI_METADATA_ARCHIVE}" -C "${z_extract_dir}" || buc_die "Failed to extract metadata"
   378→
   379→  if test -f "${z_extract_dir}/package_summary.linux_amd64.txt"; then
   380→    buc_step "Package summary (linux/amd64)"
   381→    head -5 "${z_extract_dir}/package_summary.linux_amd64.txt" || buc_die "Failed to read package summary: ${z_extract_dir}/package_summary.linux_amd64.txt"
   382→  fi
   383→
   384→  buc_success "Metadata retrieved to ${z_extract_dir}"
   385→}
   386→
   387→rbi_fqin() {
   388→  zrbi_sentinel
   389→
   390→  local z_tag="${1:-}"
   391→
   392→  # Documentation block
   393→  buc_doc_brief "Create fully qualified image name"
   394→  buc_doc_param "tag" "Image tag to qualify"
   395→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   396→
   397→  # Validate parameters
   398→  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag parameter required"
   399→
   400→  # Write FQIN to file
   401→  local z_fqin="${ZRBI_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBI_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_tag}"
   402→  echo "${z_fqin}" > "${ZRBI_FQIN_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to write FQIN"
   403→
   404→  # Also output to stdout for direct use
   405→  echo "${z_fqin}"
   406→
   407→  buc_success "FQIN generated"
   408→}

    29→
    30→zrbap_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBAP_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbap already kindled"
    32→
    33→  buc_log_args "Ensure dependencies are kindled first"
    34→  zrbgc_sentinel
    35→  zrbgo_sentinel
    36→  zrbgu_sentinel
    37→  zrbgp_sentinel
    38→
    39→  # Kindle-constant temp file paths for forensic visibility
    40→  readonly ZRBAP_AR_RESP_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbap_ar_resp.json"
    41→  readonly ZRBAP_AR_CODE_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbap_ar_code.txt"
    42→  readonly ZRBAP_AR_STDERR_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbap_ar_stderr.txt"
    43→  readonly ZRBAP_CRM_RESP_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbap_crm_resp.json"
    44→  readonly ZRBAP_CRM_CODE_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbap_crm_code.txt"
    45→  readonly ZRBAP_CRM_STDERR_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbap_crm_stderr.txt"
    46→
    47→  readonly ZRBAP_KINDLED=1
    48→}
    49→
    50→zrbap_sentinel() {
    51→  test "${ZRBAP_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbap not kindled - call zrbap_kindle first"
    52→}
    53→
    54→# Convert milliseconds to a decimal seconds string suitable for sleep
    55→zrbap_ms_to_sleep_capture() {
    56→  zrbap_sentinel
    57→
    58→  local z_ms="${1}"
    59→
    60→  buc_log_args "Converting ${z_ms}ms to sleep duration"
    61→
    62→  # Compute whole seconds and remainder milliseconds using integer arithmetic
    63→  local z_sec=$(( z_ms / 1000 ))
    64→  local z_rem=$(( z_ms % 1000 ))
    65→
    66→  # Format as decimal with three fractional digits (sleep accepts e.g. 1.500)
    67→  printf '%d.%03d' "${z_sec}" "${z_rem}"
    68→}
    69→
    70→# Resolve the RBRA file path for a given role name
    71→# Role names: governor | director | retriever
    72→zrbap_role_rbra_file_capture() {
    73→  zrbap_sentinel
    74→
    75→  local z_role="${1}"
    76→
    77→  case "${z_role}" in
    78→    governor)
    79→      test -n "${RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE:-}"  || buc_die "RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE is not set"
    80→      printf '%s\n' "${RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE}"
    81→      ;;
    82→    director)
    83→      test -n "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE:-}"  || buc_die "RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE is not set"
    84→      printf '%s\n' "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
    85→      ;;
    86→    retriever)
    87→      test -n "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE:-}" || buc_die "RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE is not set"
    88→      printf '%s\n' "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
    89→      ;;
    90→    *)
    91→      buc_die "Unknown role '${z_role}': expected governor | director | retriever"
    92→      ;;
    93→  esac
    94→}
    95→
    96→# Execute one Artifact Registry packages.list probe iteration for a JWT SA role.
    97→# Writes response to ZRBAP_AR_RESP_FILE, HTTP code to ZRBAP_AR_CODE_FILE,
    98→# and stderr to ZRBAP_AR_STDERR_FILE (kindle-constant paths for forensic visibility).
    99→zrbap_jwt_ar_probe_once() {
   100→  zrbap_sentinel
   101→
   102→  local z_role="${1}"
   103→  local z_iteration="${2}"
   104→
   105→  buc_log_args "JWT SA probe iteration ${z_iteration} for role '${z_role}'"
   106→
   107→  buc_log_args "Resolve RBRA file for role"
   108→  local z_rbra_file
   109→  z_rbra_file=$(zrbap_role_rbra_file_capture "${z_role}") || return 1
   110→
   111→  buc_log_args "Validate RBRA file exists"
   112→  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "RBRA file not found for role ${z_role}: ${z_rbra_file}"
   113→
   114→  buc_log_args "Exchange JWT for OAuth token"
   115→  local z_token
   116→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${z_rbra_file}") \
   117→    || buc_die "Failed to obtain OAuth token for role ${z_role} (iteration ${z_iteration})"
   118→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Empty OAuth token for role ${z_role} (iteration ${z_iteration})"
   119→
   120→  buc_log_args "Build Artifact Registry packages.list URL"
   121→  test -n "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set"
   122→  test -n "${RBRR_GCP_REGION:-}"       || buc_die "RBRR_GCP_REGION is not set"
   123→  test -n "${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY:-}"   || buc_die "RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY is not set"
   124→
   125→  local z_ar_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}/repositories/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}/packages"
   126→
   127→  buc_log_args "Call Artifact Registry packages.list"
   128→  local z_curl_status=0
   129→  curl                                              \
   130→      -sS                                           \
   131→      -X GET                                        \
   132→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   133→      -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   134→      -o "${ZRBAP_AR_RESP_FILE}"                    \
   135→      -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   136→      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
   137→      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"        \
   138→      "${z_ar_url}" > "${ZRBAP_AR_CODE_FILE}"       \
   139→                   2> "${ZRBAP_AR_STDERR_FILE}"     \
   140→    || z_curl_status=$?
   141→
   142→  buc_log_args "AR curl exit status: ${z_curl_status}"
   143→  buc_log_pipe < "${ZRBAP_AR_STDERR_FILE}"
   144→
   145→  test "${z_curl_status}" -eq 0 || buc_die "AR packages.list curl failed (network/SSL/DNS) for role ${z_role} iteration ${z_iteration}"
   146→
   147→  local z_code
   148→  z_code=$(<"${ZRBAP_AR_CODE_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read AR HTTP code file"
   149→  test -n "${z_code}"                || buc_die "Empty HTTP code from AR curl"
   150→
   151→  buc_log_args "AR packages.list HTTP ${z_code} for role ${z_role} iteration ${z_iteration}"
   152→
   153→  case "${z_code}" in
   154→    200|206)
   155→      buc_step "JWT SA probe [${z_role}] iteration ${z_iteration}: OK (HTTP ${z_code})"
   156→      ;;
   157→    401|403)
   158→      buc_die "JWT SA probe [${z_role}] iteration ${z_iteration}: access denied (HTTP ${z_code})"
   159→      ;;
   160→    *)
   161→      local z_err=""
   162→      if jq -e . "${ZRBAP_AR_RESP_FILE}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   163→        z_err=$(jq -r '.error.message // "Unknown error"' "${ZRBAP_AR_RESP_FILE}" 2>/dev/null) || z_err="Unknown error"
   164→      else
   165→        z_err="Non-JSON response (HTTP ${z_code})"
   166→      fi
   167→      buc_die "JWT SA probe [${z_role}] iteration ${z_iteration}: unexpected HTTP ${z_code}: ${z_err}"
   168→      ;;
   169→  esac
   170→}
   171→
   172→# Execute one CRM projects.get probe iteration for the Payor OAuth flow.
   173→# Writes response to ZRBAP_CRM_RESP_FILE, HTTP code to ZRBAP_CRM_CODE_FILE,
   174→# and stderr to ZRBAP_CRM_STDERR_FILE (kindle-constant paths for forensic visibility).
   175→zrbap_payor_crm_probe_once() {
   176→  zrbap_sentinel
   177→
   178→  local z_iteration="${1}"
   179→
   180→  buc_log_args "Payor OAuth probe iteration ${z_iteration}"
   181→
   182→  buc_log_args "Authenticate via Payor OAuth refresh token flow"
   183→  local z_token
   184→  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) \
   185→    || buc_die "Failed to obtain Payor OAuth access token (iteration ${z_iteration})"
   186→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Empty Payor OAuth access token (iteration ${z_iteration})"
   187→
   188→  buc_log_args "Build CRM projects.get URL"
   189→  test -n "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID is not set"
   190→
   191→  local z_crm_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/projects/${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
   192→
   193→  buc_log_args "Call CRM projects.get on payor project"
   194→  local z_curl_status=0
   195→  curl                                               \
   196→      -sS                                            \
   197→      -X GET                                         \
   198→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"          \
   199→      -H "Accept: application/json"                  \
   200→      -o "${ZRBAP_CRM_RESP_FILE}"                    \
   201→      -w "%{http_code}"                              \
   202→      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
   203→      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"         \
   204→      "${z_crm_url}" > "${ZRBAP_CRM_CODE_FILE}"      \
   205→                    2> "${ZRBAP_CRM_STDERR_FILE}"    \
   206→    || z_curl_status=$?
   207→
   208→  buc_log_args "CRM curl exit status: ${z_curl_status}"
   209→  buc_log_pipe < "${ZRBAP_CRM_STDERR_FILE}"
   210→
   211→  test "${z_curl_status}" -eq 0 || buc_die "CRM projects.get curl failed (network/SSL/DNS) for Payor iteration ${z_iteration}"
   212→
   213→  local z_code
   214→  z_code=$(<"${ZRBAP_CRM_CODE_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read CRM HTTP code file"
   215→  test -n "${z_code}"                 || buc_die "Empty HTTP code from CRM curl"
   216→
   217→  buc_log_args "CRM projects.get HTTP ${z_code} for Payor iteration ${z_iteration}"
   218→
   219→  case "${z_code}" in
   220→    200)
   221→      buc_step "Payor OAuth probe iteration ${z_iteration}: OK (HTTP ${z_code})"
   222→      ;;
   223→    401|403)
   224→      buc_die "Payor OAuth probe iteration ${z_iteration}: access denied (HTTP ${z_code})"
   225→      ;;
   226→    *)
   227→      local z_err=""
   228→      if jq -e . "${ZRBAP_CRM_RESP_FILE}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   229→        z_err=$(jq -r '.error.message // "Unknown error"' "${ZRBAP_CRM_RESP_FILE}" 2>/dev/null) || z_err="Unknown error"
   230→      else
   231→        z_err="Non-JSON response (HTTP ${z_code})"
   232→      fi
   233→      buc_die "Payor OAuth probe iteration ${z_iteration}: unexpected HTTP ${z_code}: ${z_err}"
   234→      ;;
   235→  esac
   236→}
   237→
   238→######################################################################
   239→# External Functions (rbap_*)
   240→
   241→# Probe 1: JWT SA Access Probe
   242→#
   243→# For each iteration:
   244→#   1. Exchange JWT for OAuth token via rbgo_get_token_capture with role's RBRA file
   245→#   2. Call Artifact Registry packages.list to verify token grants read access
   246→#   3. Sleep for configured delay
   247→#
   248→# All three roles have read access:
   249→#   Governor  = Owner
   250→#   Director  = repoAdmin
   251→#   Retriever = reader
   252→rbap_jwt_sa_probe() {
   253→  zrbap_sentinel
   254→
   255→  local z_role="${1:-}"
   256→  local z_count="${2:-1}"
   257→  local z_delay_ms="${3:-0}"
   258→
   259→  buc_doc_brief "Probe JWT service account access for a given role against Artifact Registry"
   260→  buc_doc_param "role"     "Role to probe: governor | director | retriever"
   261→  buc_doc_param "count"    "Number of iterations (default: 1)"
   262→  buc_doc_param "delay_ms" "Milliseconds to sleep between iterations (default: 0)"
   263→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   264→
   265→  test -n "${z_role}"  || buc_die "role parameter required (governor | director | retriever)"
   266→  test -n "${z_count}" || buc_die "count parameter required"
   267→
   268→  buc_step "JWT SA access probe: role=${z_role} count=${z_count} delay_ms=${z_delay_ms}"
   269→
   270→  local z_iter=1
   271→  while test "${z_iter}" -le "${z_count}"; do
   272→    buc_step "JWT SA probe [${z_role}] iteration ${z_iter}/${z_count}"
   273→
   274→    zrbap_jwt_ar_probe_once "${z_role}" "${z_iter}"
   275→
   276→    if test "${z_iter}" -lt "${z_count}" && test "${z_delay_ms}" -gt 0; then
   277→      local z_sleep
   278→      z_sleep=$(zrbap_ms_to_sleep_capture "${z_delay_ms}")
   279→      buc_log_args "Sleeping ${z_sleep}s (${z_delay_ms}ms) before next iteration"
   280→      sleep "${z_sleep}"
   281→    fi
   282→
   283→    z_iter=$(( z_iter + 1 ))
   284→  done
   285→
   286→  buc_step "JWT SA access probe complete: role=${z_role} iterations=${z_count}"
   287→}
   288→
   289→# Probe 2: Payor OAuth Access Probe
   290→#
   291→# For each iteration:
   292→#   1. Authenticate via zrbgp_authenticate_capture (RBRO refresh token -> access token)
   293→#   2. Call CRM projects.get on payor project to verify token works
   294→#   3. Sleep for configured delay
   295→rbap_payor_oauth_probe() {
   296→  zrbap_sentinel
   297→
   298→  local z_count="${1:-1}"
   299→  local z_delay_ms="${2:-0}"
   300→
   301→  buc_doc_brief "Probe Payor OAuth access against Cloud Resource Manager (CRM) projects.get"
   302→  buc_doc_param "count"    "Number of iterations (default: 1)"
   303→  buc_doc_param "delay_ms" "Milliseconds to sleep between iterations (default: 0)"
   304→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   305→
   306→  test -n "${z_count}" || buc_die "count parameter required"
   307→
   308→  buc_step "Payor OAuth access probe: count=${z_count} delay_ms=${z_delay_ms}"
   309→
   310→  local z_iter=1
   311→  while test "${z_iter}" -le "${z_count}"; do
   312→    buc_step "Payor OAuth probe iteration ${z_iter}/${z_count}"
   313→
   314→    zrbap_payor_crm_probe_once "${z_iter}"
   315→
   316→    if test "${z_iter}" -lt "${z_count}" && test "${z_delay_ms}" -gt 0; then
   317→      local z_sleep
   318→      z_sleep=$(zrbap_ms_to_sleep_capture "${z_delay_ms}")
   319→      buc_log_args "Sleeping ${z_sleep}s (${z_delay_ms}ms) before next iteration"
   320→      sleep "${z_sleep}"
   321→    fi
   322→
   323→    z_iter=$(( z_iter + 1 ))
   324→  done
   325→
   326→  buc_step "Payor OAuth access probe complete: iterations=${z_count}"
   327→}
   328→
   329→# eof
   330→

    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle OAuth Regime - Validator Module
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBRO_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbro multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBRO_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbro_*)
    29→
    30→zrbro_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBRO_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbro already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # No defaults set — buv uses ${!varname:-} for safe indirect expansion under set -u.
    34→  # Unset variables are detected distinctly from empty by zbuv_check_capture.
    35→
    36→  # Enroll all RBRO variables — single source of truth for validation and rendering
    37→  buv_regime_enroll RBRO
    38→
    39→  buv_group_enroll "OAuth Credentials"
    40→  buv_string_enroll  RBRO_CLIENT_SECRET  1  512  "OAuth client secret"
    41→  buv_string_enroll  RBRO_REFRESH_TOKEN  1  512  "OAuth refresh token"
    42→
    43→  # Guard against unexpected RBRO_ variables not in enrollment
    44→  buv_scope_sentinel RBRO RBRO_
    45→
    46→  readonly ZRBRO_KINDLED=1
    47→}
    48→
    49→zrbro_sentinel() {
    50→  test "${ZRBRO_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbro not kindled - call zrbro_kindle first"
    51→}
    52→
    53→# Enforce all RBRO enrollment validations
    54→zrbro_enforce() {
    55→  zrbro_sentinel
    56→  buv_vet RBRO
    57→}
    58→
    59→# Lock step — lock enrolled variables against mutation after enforcement
    60→zrbro_lock() {
    61→  zrbro_sentinel
    62→
    63→  # Lock all enrolled RBRO_ variables against mutation
    64→  buv_lock RBRO
    65→}
    66→
    67→######################################################################
    68→# Public Functions (rbro_*)
    69→
    70→# Load RBRO from RBRR_PAYOR_RBRO_FILE (kindle constant from RBRR_SECRETS_DIR)
    71→# Requires: RBRR kindled+enforced+locked (RBRR_PAYOR_RBRO_FILE is a lock-step constant)
    72→rbro_load() {
    73→  local z_rbro_file="${RBRR_PAYOR_RBRO_FILE}"
    74→
    75→  test -f "${z_rbro_file}" || buc_die "RBRO credentials missing (${z_rbro_file}) - run rbgp_payor_install"
    76→  test -r "${z_rbro_file}" || buc_die "RBRO file not readable - check permissions"
    77→
    78→  # Source and validate
    79→  source "${z_rbro_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source RBRO credentials"
    80→  zrbro_kindle
    81→  zrbro_enforce
    82→  zrbro_lock
    83→}
    84→
    85→# eof
    86→

    20→#

    22→# (~30 seconds) for OAuth/credential issues that would otherwise surface
    23→# only after the 4-minute ark-lifecycle suite begins.

    31→######################################################################
    32→# Test cases
    33→#
    34→# Each test case kindles the rbap module and calls the corresponding
    35→# public probe function.  Parameters (iterations, delay) are set by
    36→# the suite setup function in rbtb_testbench.sh via ZRBTCAP_* globals.
    37→
    38→# rbtcap_jwt_governor_tcase - JWT SA access probe for Governor role

    92→# rbtcap_payor_oauth_tcase - Payor OAuth access probe
    93→rbtcap_payor_oauth_tcase() {
    94→  buto_info "Payor OAuth access probe"
    95→  source "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source ${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
    96→  zrbrr_kindle
    97→  zrbrr_enforce
    98→  zrbrr_lock
    99→  zrbgc_kindle
   100→
   101→  source "${RBBC_rbrp_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source RBRP: ${RBBC_rbrp_file}"
   102→  zrbrp_kindle
